title: Farmer's Combat [DEPRECATED]
description: Adds Compatibility with Farmer's Delight's Knives and Better Combat
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1113796208335527998/1168065833050841088/logo.png?ex=65506914&is=653df414&hm=530e7ef7fc0478839bc49456768be1a2c6bcb582f833132e3752f31d65985f53&)

Just a simple datapack that adds compatibility with Farmers Delight (and addons) to Better Combat

It Works Both For Forge and Fabric


You obv need the 2 mods for this

Better Combat: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus

Farmers Delight: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight
